boundary.title: Something went wrong
boundary.description: We're sorry, but something unexpected happened. Please try refreshing the page or contact support if the problem persists.

network.title: Network Error
network.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.message: The requested resource could not be found.

error.loadingRecipes: Error loading recipes. Please try again.

loadingRecipe.title: Error Loading Recipe
loadingRecipe.message: Unable to load the recipe. Please try again later.

error.badRequest: Invalid request. Please check your input and try again.
error.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action. Please sign in and try again.
error.forbidden: Access denied. You don't have permission to access this resource.
error.validation: Please check your input and correct any errors.
error.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
